items.title: Telegram bots without servers
items.oneliner: Deploy JavaScript Telegram bots with one CLI command, built-in SQLite, and auto-scaling on Telegram's own infrastructure.

items.title: Phone-sized 27B open model
items.oneliner: Apache-licensed 27B model fits in 3.9 GB and keeps about 90 to 95 percent of full precision quality.

items.title: Keyboard control for any desktop
items.oneliner: Open source desktop app uses computer vision to click, switch windows, and select UI elements without touching a mouse.

items.title: USB-C cable diagnostics for macOS
items.oneliner: Menu bar app explains each USB-C cable's charging, data, and fault status in plain English on macOS.

items.title: Automatic fixup commits for Git
items.oneliner: CLI folds uncommitted changes into the right historical commits automatically, keeping review-driven Git history clean.

items.title: HTMX patterns for Go apps
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide shows template structure, partial responses, and production patterns for building interactive Go apps with HTMX.

items.title: Branchless binary search tutorial
items.oneliner: Deep optimization walkthrough shows how branchless binary search reached 6x speedups using Rust and CPU-level techniques.

items.title: Safer QR code generation
items.oneliner: Rust crate detects and avoids accidental swastika patterns in generated QR codes with no extra dependencies.

items.title: Modern multiboot USB alternative
items.oneliner: GPL tool builds UEFI-only multiboot USB drives as a simpler, security-focused alternative to Ventoy.

items.title: Build your own climate logger
items.oneliner: Open hardware project includes firmware, PCB files, and assembly steps for an ESP32 e-paper temperature logger.
